---
title: "Research & Projects"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

This compatibility page points to the reorganized **Research & Projects** sections. Please use the navigation menu for the current project pages.

## Featured Research

A wildfire-focused research trajectory from burned-area mapping and post-fire ecological assessment to spatially explainable fire driver analysis and wildfire prediction modeling.

- Wildfire Monitoring and Burned Area Mapping in Xichang City
- Post-fire Land-use / Land-cover Change and RSEI-based Ecological Assessment
- Spatially Explainable Analysis of Forest and Grass Fire Drivers in Southwest China
- Wildfire Prediction Modeling in Southwest China

[Open Featured Research](research/featured-research.qmd)

## Applied Remote Sensing & AI4RS Projects

AI for Remote Sensing and public-safe applied remote sensing experience, including scene classification, satellite data preprocessing, operational monitoring workflows, agricultural monitoring, and crop-yield estimation workflows.

[Open Applied Remote Sensing & AI4RS Projects](research/applied-remote-sensing-engineering.qmd)

## Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis

Earlier GIScience and spatial analysis projects involving multi-source geospatial data, spatial statistics, spatial econometric models, and urban/regional analysis.

- Multiscale Spatial Patterns and Driving Mechanisms of Homestay Development in Liangshan Prefecture
- Integrated Assessment of Urban Development Quality in Jinan City Using Multi-source Geospatial Data

[Open Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis](research/additional-gis-spatial-analysis.qmd)
